Name: Arceus V
Effects: Search your deck for up to 3 basic Energy cards and attach them to your Pokémon V in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Arceus VSTAR
Ability-Effect: During your turn, you may search your deck for up to 2 cards and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck. (You can't use more than 1 VSTAR Power in a game. )
Effects: Search your deck for up to 3 basic Energy cards and attach them to your Pokémon V in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VSTAR is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.
